blocks.text: Match preview: Nottinghamshire face Somerset in 35th Match (TEST) on Fri, 12 Jun, 2026, 3:30 pm at Trent Bridge Nottingham. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Classic English seaming conditions when clouds cover; batting paradise in sunshine.
Light drizzle · High 21°C / Low 15°C · Rain: 0.2 mm · Wind: up to 28 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
